name: Whoopie Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together the shortening and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the egg, milk, and vanilla, mixing well after each addition.
4. Sift in the dry ingredients (flour, salt, cocoa powder, baking powder, and baking soda) and mix until just combined.
5. Drop teaspoonfuls of batter onto a greased cookie sheet, flattening with the bottom of a glass.
6. Bake for 8 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow to cool completely.
8. Spoon filling between the cakes to form whoopie pies.
Makes approximately 3 dozen pies.
